notes: Without any setting it crashes with "Win32 function failed. HRESULT: 0x80004005. Call at line 226 in \Graphics_DisplayM.cpp". Disabling ESYNC does not seem to have an effect. Disabling DSd11 doesn't help, game still doesn't start but the warning is not shown. It works once that "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" is set in Launch Options. Projectiles are not shown in tutorial but in the main game they are.
title: Acid Nimbus

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
